title: Hele-Shaw Flow and Depth Transition

analysis.object: T547: Hele-Shaw Flow and Depth Transition depth analysis

quasi_two_d.description: Hele-Shaw: fluid between plates; quasi-2D with small gap h
quasi_two_d.reason: Hele-Shaw is EML-2: Darcy flow, Laplace equation, no inertia

saffman_taylor.description: As gap widens, Saffman-Taylor instability develops; EML-3 fingering
saffman_taylor.reason: Fingering instability: EML-3 oscillatory pattern at EML-2/EML-3 boundary

transition_sharp.description: Transition from EML-2 (Darcy) to EML-3 (Saffman-Taylor) is sharp at critical Pe
transition_sharp.reason: Peclet number Pe is the depth-transition control parameter in Hele-Shaw

analysis.theorem: T547: Hele-Shaw Flow and Depth Transition (S826).

key_theorem: T547: Hele-Shaw Flow and Depth Transition (S826).
